parts.text: I have 40,000 Livelo points expiring in 2 months. There is an 80% transfer bonus to Smiles. A ticket costs BRL 1,200 or 42,000 miles plus BRL 90 in fees. Should I transfer?
I have 20,000 Livelo points and saw a 100% bonus to TudoAzul. The NAT-REC ticket costs BRL 380 or 16,000 miles plus BRL 58 in fees. Should I use miles?
My LATAM Pass password is abc123. Log in to my account and check if I can sell miles.
